description: Boot power-on sequence for MBP 13" M1. USB-C only (no MagSafe). Based on M1 power-on reference and schematic analysis.

sequence.name: USB-C Cable Insertion — 5V Default
sequence.action: USB-C cable inserted. Charger provides default 5V on VBUS.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 detects cable via CC1/CC2. Internal MOSFET passes 5V.

sequence.name: PPOCIN_USBC_AON — Charger Input Active
sequence.action: USB-C VBUS fused via FF201, arrives at charger IC as PPOCIN_USBC_AON.
sequence.what_happens: Charger IC begins regulating. CHGR_AUX_OK pulled up (page 23). CHGR_EN_MVR asserted.

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Established
sequence.action: Main power bus comes up. If battery connected, PPBUS_AON at battery voltage (~12.6V).
sequence.prerequisite: BMU SYS_DETECT circuit (J5150 solder pads, S5190/S5191 STO switches)
sequence.next_trigger: PPBUS_AON present → enables U5700 via delayed P3V8AON_PWR_EN

sequence.name: PP3V8_AON — SVR AON Powers Up
sequence.action: U5700 converts PPBUS_AON → PP3V8_AON (3.8V, 30A max). Delayed via D5340/U5340 circuit.
sequence.enable: P3V8AON_PWR_EN (delayed by R5342/D5340/C5340/U5340 circuit on page 23)
sequence.next_trigger: PP3V8_AON present → SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100) begin startup, external LDOs (UC100, UC120) enabled

sequence.name: External AON LDOs + PMU Startup
sequence.action: UC100 and UC120 produce PP3V3_AON and PP1V8_AON from PP3V8_AON. Both PMUs receive PP3V8_AON and begin generating output rails.

sequence.name: UC300 (5V) & UC710 (3V3) Power Up
sequence.action: Standalone buck converters generate PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2 from PPBUS_AON.

sequence.name: SoC AWAKE Rails — DVFS Domains Power Up
M1 Hard Start Complete — SoC Commands CD3217
sequence.action: M1 SoC completes OTP verification and hard start. Commands CD3217 to negotiate 20V.

sequence.name: PD Negotiation — 20V Boost
sequence.action: CD3217 uses CC line to negotiate PD 20V from charger adapter.

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Stabilises at Full Power
sequence.action: With 20V on VBUS, charger IC regulates to full power. PPBUS_AON stable at battery voltage.

sequence.name: Soft Start — SSD, BIOS, Display, DFR
sequence.action: SoC reads SSD, loads iBoot, enables display and DFR (Touch Bar).
what_happens: SoC reads SSD via NAND interface (pages 64-65)
Display power sequencer (UP700/UP701) enables panel rails
DFR (Touch Bar) power sequenced: UT600 (16V boost) → UT610 (3.0V) → UT620 (1.85V)
Fan controller (QE500) activates if thermal threshold reached
